segment.source: Win Wizard
segment.target: Win Wizard

segment.source: Author: Oriol Gómez, current maintenance by Łukasz Golonka
segment.target: Author: Oriol Gómez, current maintenance by Łukasz Golonka

segment.source: NVDA compatibility: 2019.3 and beyond
segment.target: NVDA compatibility: 2019.3 and beyond

segment.source: This add-on allows you to perform some operations on the focused window or the process associated with it.
segment.target: This add-on allows you to perform some operations on the focused window or the process associated with it.

segment.source: Keyboard commands:
segment.target: Keyboard commands:

segment.source: All these commands can be remapped from the Input gestures dialog in the Win Wizard category.
segment.target: All these commands can be remapped from the Input gestures dialog in the Win Wizard category.

segment.source: Hiding and showing hidden windows:
segment.target: Hiding and showing hidden windows:

segment.source: NVDA+Windows+numbers from 1 to 0 - hides currently focused window in the slot corresponding to the pressed number
segment.target: NVDA+Windows+numbers from 1 to 0 - hides currently focused window in the slot corresponding to the pressed number

segment.source: NVDA+Windows+left arrow - moves to the previous stack of hidden windows.
segment.target: NVDA+Windows+left arrow - moves to the previous stack of hidden windows.

segment.source: NVDA+Windows+right arrow - moves to the next stack of hidden windows.
segment.target: NVDA+Windows+right arrow - moves to the next stack of hidden windows.

segment.source: Windows+Shift+h - hides the currently focused window in the first available slot
segment.target: Windows+Shift+h - hides the currently focused window in the first available slot

segment.source: NVDA+Windows+h - shows the last hidden window
segment.target: NVDA+Windows+h - shows the last hidden window

segment.source: Windows+Shift+l - shows the list of all hidden windows grouped by the stacks (please note that by default last hidden window is selected)
segment.target: Windows+Shift+l - shows the list of all hidden windows grouped by the stacks (please note that by default last hidden window is selected)

segment.source: Managing processes:
segment.target: Managing processes:

segment.source: Windows+F4 - kills the process associated with the currently focused window
segment.target: Windows+F4 - kills the process associated with the currently focused window

segment.source: NVDA+Windows+p - opens dialog allowing you to set priority of the process associated with the currently focused window
segment.target: NVDA+Windows+p - opens dialog allowing you to set priority of the process associated with the currently focused window

segment.source: Miscellaneous commands:
segment.target: Miscellaneous commands:

segment.source: NVDA+Windows+TAB - switches between top level windows of the current program (useful in foobar2000, Back4Sure etc.)
segment.target: NVDA+Windows+TAB - switches between top level windows of the current program (useful in foobar2000, Back4Sure etc.)

segment.source: CTRL+ALT+T - allows you to change title of the currently focused program
segment.target: CTRL+ALT+T - allows you to change title of the currently focused program

segment.source: Changes:
segment.target: Changes:

segment.source: Changes for 5.0.3:
segment.target: Changes for 5.0.3:

segment.source: - Compatibility with NVDA 2021.1
segment.target: - Compatibility with NVDA 2021.1

segment.source: Changes for 5.0.2:
segment.target: Changes for 5.0.2:

segment.source: - First release available from the add-ons website
segment.target: - First release available from the add-ons website
